data.title: The Manitowoc Company (NYSE: MTW) will release Q2 2025 results on Aug 7 after market close, with conference call on Aug 8 at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: Manitowoc Company, Inc. revealed plans to unveil its Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025, post-market closure. Following this, on August 8, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET (9:00 a.m. CT), the company will hold a conference call to delve into the outcomes and projections. Interested parties can access the conference call through a webcast on Manitowoc's website at http://ir.manitowoc.com in the “Events & Presentations” segment. For those who miss it, a replay will be available.

data.title: Deckers Brands reports strong first quarter fiscal 2026 results with HOKA and UGG exceeding expectations, setting a positive tone for the fiscal year.
data.description: In Goleta, California, Deckers Brands, renowned for its innovative footwear, apparel, and accessories, disclosed their financial performance for the initial fiscal quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. The company, trading as DECK on NYSE, highlighted exceptional results from their brands HOKA and UGG surpassing projections. Stefano, the company spokesperson, voiced satisfaction with the strong growth seen, signaling a promising start to fiscal year 2026. The second fiscal quarter outlook ending on September 30, 2025, was also shared, indicating a positive trend in their financial performance.

data.title: B&G Foods (NYSE: BGS) to release Q2 2025 financial results on August 4th, hosting a conference call with CEO and CFO.
data.description: B&G Foods, Inc. (NYSE: BGS) based in Parsippany, N.J., will release its second quarter financial results on August 4, 2025, after the market closes. The company has scheduled a conference call for 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results with President and CEO Casey Keller and CFO Bruce Wacha. This announcement was made in a press release.

data.title: Reynolds Consumer Products declares $0.23 quarterly dividend, payable on August 29, 2025, to shareholders of record on August 15, 2025.
data.description: In Lake Forest, Illinois, Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. (Nasdaq: REYN) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.23 per common share. Shareholders of record as of August 15, 2025, will receive the dividend on August 29, 2025. Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. is known for its household essentials that aim to simplify daily life for consumers, with its products present in 95% of households across the United States.

data.title: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BOOT) will report Q1 FY2026 results on July 31, 2025, with conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET. Participants can dial (866) 652-5200.
data.description: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BOOT) based in Irvine, California, has announced that they will be releasing their financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026, which ended on June 28, 2025. The report will be made public after the market closes on Thursday, July 31, 2025. A conference call will be held on the same day at 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT) for management to discuss the results. Interested investors and analysts can join the call by dialing (866) 652-5200 at 4:25 p.m. ET.

data.title: Jamieson Wellness Inc. (TSX: JWEL) will release Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7, 2025, hosting a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.
data.description: In Toronto, Jamieson Wellness Inc. (TSX:JWEL) disclosed its plan to unveil its Q2 2025 financial outcomes post-market closure on Thursday, August 7, 2025. Additionally, the organization will conduct an investor conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into the Q2 2025 results. For those interested, the call can be joined live via phone by dialing 1-800-717-1738 within Canada and the U.S., or 1-646-307-1865 internationally.

data.title: CVG to discuss Q2 2025 financial results on August 5, 2025, at 8:30 am ET. Press release and presentation to be issued.
data.description: On July 24, 2025, in New Albany, Ohio, Commercial Vehicle Group, known as CVG and listed on NASDAQ as CVGI, announced their plan to conduct a quarterly conference call on August 5, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the call is to review the financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. Prior to the conference call, CVG intends to release a press statement and presentation to provide further details.

data.title: Kennel Connection appoints Paul D’Arrigo as Lead Technical Advisor to CEO, enhancing technical strategy.
data.description: Kennel Connection, headquartered in Moorpark, California, has appointed Paul D’Arrigo as the Lead Technical Advisor to the CEO. In his new role, D’Arrigo will focus on boosting innovation and enhancing the company’s technical strategy.

data.title: Grindr (NYSE: GRND) to release Q2 earnings on August 7, 2025, after market close, webcast earnings call to follow.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Grindr Inc. (NYSE: GRND) disclosed its plan to unveil financial outcomes for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2025. The report will be made public post-market closure on Thursday, August 7, 2025. Interested parties can find the Shareholder Letter on Grindr's Investor Relations website at https://investors.grindr.com. Additionally, Grindr is set to conduct a webcasted conference call subsequent to the Shareholder Letter release to deliberate on its performance.

data.title: Owlet Inc. will report Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025, with a conference call at 4:30 pm ET. Participants can join at 833-470-1428.
data.description: Lehi, Utah-based company Owlet, Inc. (NYSE: OWLT), a leading provider of baby monitors, is set to reveal its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on Thursday, August 7. The announcement is scheduled to be made after the market closes. CEO and Co-Founder Kurt Workman, President Jonathan Harris, and CFO Amanda Twede Crawford will conduct a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day to elaborate on the results and offer insights into the company's operations. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing 833-470-1428 for domestic participants.

data.title: WM Technology, Inc. will disclose Q2 2025 results on August 7, 2025 after market close. Webcast at 2pm PT/5pm ET.
data.description: WM Technology, Inc., a prominent provider of marketplace and technology solutions to the cannabis sector, will disclose its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025 on August 7, 2025. The report will be released after the market closes and will be followed by a webcast led by management at 2 p.m. PT (5 p.m. ET) on the same day. The Company's stock trades on Nasdaq under the symbol MAPS.

data.title: AMERISAFE reauthorizes $25 million share repurchase program in Deridder, Louisiana.
data.description: DERIDDER, La.-- AMERISAFE has recently revealed the reauthorization of their share repurchase program which amounts to $25.0 million. This development is expected to create significant positive impacts for the organization.

data.title: Newmont Corp. reports Q2 2025 results: 1.5M gold ounces produced, $1.7B record free cash flow, and $3.0B share repurchase program.
data.description: In Denver today, Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, TSX: NGT, PNGX: NEM) shared its second quarter 2025 earnings. The company reported producing around 1.5 million attributable gold ounces during the quarter and achieving a record quarterly free cash flow of $1.7 billion. In addition to its strong performance, Newmont also announced a new $3.0 billion share repurchase program. Furthermore, the company declared a dividend of $0.251 per share. These results highlight the robustness of Newmont's portfolio and its continued success in the market.
